prompt: Commit my staged changes. I renamed M3LPaths.outputDir to M3LPaths.archiveDir everywhere — internal call-sites and the public type. This is a breaking change for any consumer using the old property name.

assertions.text: Subject line starts with 'feat!:' (breaking change marker present)
Subject line names the renamed symbol (outputDir or archiveDir)
Body includes migration instructions (what consumers must change)
Body includes a BREAKING CHANGE note (footer or prose)
Body includes a Co-Authored-By footer with noreply@anthropic.com
